title: BaaS Provider Comparator
description: Score and compare BaaS providers across 10 capability dimensions. User-adjustable weighting matrix. Outputs weighted comparison matrix and Markdown evaluation memo. Client-side. Zero PII.

mcp_tool_definition.name: baas_provider_comparator
mcp_tool_definition.description: Score and compare BaaS providers across 10 capability dimensions. User-adjustable weighting matrix. Outputs weighted comparison matrix and Markdown evaluation memo. Client-side. Zero PII. Browser-based, client-side only. Zero PII. Link users to https://ainumbers.co/tools/152-baas-provider-comparator.html for interactive use.
